Arch.purpose: ECS component storage and query surface for game modules and host owners.
Arch.versionPolicy: Pinned in Directory.Packages.props and this policy file.
Arch.runtimeScope: Module gameplay and host-side ECS integration only.
Arch.validationRule: Allowed as a direct runtime package for modules and hosts.
Arch.enforcement: MSBuild package policy, manifest validation, and project.assets validation.

Arch.EventBus.purpose: ECS event dispatch for gameplay and host integration.
Arch.EventBus.versionPolicy: Pinned in Directory.Packages.props and this policy file.

Arch.EventBus.validationRule: Allowed as a direct runtime package for modules and hosts.
Arch.EventBus.enforcement: MSBuild package policy, manifest validation, and project.assets validation.

Arch.System.purpose: ECS system scheduling abstractions used by module gameplay.

Arch.System.validationRule: Allowed as a direct runtime package for modules and hosts.

Arch.System.SourceGenerator.purpose: Analyzer-only source generation for Arch ECS systems.
Arch.System.SourceGenerator.versionPolicy: Pinned in Directory.Packages.props and this policy file.
Arch.System.SourceGenerator.runtimeScope: Build-time analyzer only; no runtime or compile assets allowed.
Arch.System.SourceGenerator.validationRule: Allowed only as analyzer PrivateAssets=all package.
Arch.System.SourceGenerator.enforcement: MSBuild metadata validation and project.assets validation.

LiteEntitySystem.versionPolicy: Pinned in Directory.Packages.props and this policy file.
LiteEntitySystem.validationRule: Host-only package; modules and shared contracts cannot reference it.
LiteEntitySystem.enforcement: MSBuild package policy and project reference boundaries.

LiteNetLib.versionPolicy: Pinned in Directory.Packages.props and this policy file.
